overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway in a futuristic urban setting. The scene features dense commercial architecture, digital billboards, palm trees, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic under clear midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with graffiti-covered wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, following the flow of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright yellow shirt walking ahead in the same direction
yellow taxi cab driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure casting shadows over the sidewalk
tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
tall residential tower with green-tinted glass windows and balconies
tall palm trees lining the street between sidewalk and road

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. A graffiti-covered concrete wall runs along the left side while a green glass residential tower stands on the right. Palm trees line the street and a yellow taxi passes by on the road as pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with large digital advertising displays

events.description: large digital billboards and advertisements come into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward, passing other pedestrians while approaching the digital billboard area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking ahead, carrying a bag

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying 'ALL FOODS' advertisement with cartoon character
contemporary building with dark facade and horizontal lines
wooden bench situated on the sidewalk near the palm trees

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more commercial area dominated by large digital billboards on the right displaying bright advertisements. The graffiti wall and green building recede behind as modern office structures appear on the left. The character continues walking past benches and palm trees while the elevated highway remains overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit corridor with elevated monorail and open plaza approach

events.description: monorail train passes overhead on the elevated track to the left

agents.ego_description: walking toward the open plaza area, approaching the monorail station with fewer pedestrians around

entered.detail: elevated monorail track structure running perpendicular to the street
red and white monorail train moving along the elevated track
tall modern skyscraper visible in the distance beyond the plaza

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up as the character approaches a transit area with an elevated monorail track. A red and white monorail train passes overhead while the elevated highway structure recedes to the left. The view expands to show distant futuristic skyscrapers and an open plaza ahead, with digital billboards now behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic sidewalk that transitions from a gritty urban underpass into a bright, open transit plaza. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, moving past a graffiti-covered concrete wall and a green glass residential tower while palm trees and a yellow taxi line the street. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward a commercial district where the concrete walls recede and are replaced by towering digital billboards and modern office structures. The environment then opens up as the highway structure moves to the left, giving way to an elevated monorail track where a red and white train passes overhead. Finally, the view expands past the billboards to reveal a wide plaza and a skyline of distant futuristic skyscrapers under the midday sun.
